title: astragalus rousseanus
intro: Astragalus rousseanus, also known as the mountain milkvetch, is a plant species within the legume family native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus rousseanus include improving immune function, reducing fatigue, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. Astragalus rousseanus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, tablets, and teas, as well as being used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulations.
